---
title: Parc de la Vallée aux Loups
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039590/parcvaleeauxloups_wz4ng4.png
description: Cèdre du Liban du parc de la Vallée aux Loups
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2025/02/08
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039590/parcvaleeauxloups_wz4ng4.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
